description:
Niva Bupa ReAssure 3.0  comes NO LIMITS Specifically for Sum Insured, Unlimited Claims & there is No restriction on any of the illnesses. 
 Niva Bupa ReAssure 3.0 comes in 4 variants : Classic, Select, Elite & Black.

ICICI Lombard Elevate is an unlimited health insurance plan that provides unlimited sum insured options and access to an infinite claim amount with the Infinite Care benefit.

Also, this comes with unlimited restoration of the sum insured with the Reset benefit.


In this video , we have compared both Niva Bupa ReAssure 3.0 & ICICI Lombard Elevate on the basis of the features, waiting periods , riders as well as the premiums.

Watch the Video for more details :)

To buy insurance policies, click here - https://bit.ly/YoutubeHareepatti
